title: AAS Subject Attributes
description: ABAC subject attributes for AAS Part 4. Describes who is requesting access: role class, optional BPN identifier, credential type, and arbitrary extension claims.

subjectClass.description: Role or class of the accessing subject

subjectId.description: Optional identifier (e.g. BPN, DID, or internal role ID)

attributes.description: Additional subject attributes (role claims, organization, etc.)
